response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished software engineer with 30+ years of experience exceeding the educational requirements, but the role requires specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and deep neural network optimization. The career is entirely focused on application and web software development—a fundamentally different domain from hardware architecture for AI accelerators. While software engineering fundamentals are relevant, the specific technical competencies are absent.
strengths: Exceeds educational requirements with 30+ years of professional experience and strong foundation in system-level thinking
Demonstrated performance optimization skills from Dunnhumby work with high-throughput, low-latency systems handling millions of requests
Multiple architecture and design roles showing ability to work across full stack and bridge different technical domains
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience despite these being core responsibilities
Career entirely in application/web software with no evidence of deep learning workload expertise or GPU/accelerator optimization
No background in SIMD/MIMD architectures, hardware profiling, or hardware-software co-design at scale

key_factors.factor: Deep learning and AI accelerator optimization experience
Performance optimization and system design background
